highlights: Strong resale demand in Whitefield micro-market
listings.notes: Typical negotiation band 2–5% depending on inventory.

highlights: Good for long-term appreciation near airport
listings.notes: Payment plan varies by tower; confirm tranche schedule.
Check maintenance escalation clauses in society bylaws.
Mumbai deals depend heavily on carpet area and view premium.

project_briefs.title: Prestige Lakeside Habitat — quick brief
project_briefs.content: Integrated township in Whitefield with strong amenities. Common buyer questions: maintenance/HOA, school access, commute to ITPL, resale liquidity. Typical objections: 'too far', 'maintenance high', 'waiting for spouse approval'.

project_briefs.title: Godrej Ananda — quick brief
project_briefs.content: North Bangalore near Aerospace Park corridor. Good for long-term horizon. Common questions: possession timeline, tranche payment plan, pre-EMI impact. Objections: 'airport area is too early', 'traffic'.

playbooks.title: Spousal objection handling
playbooks.content: Acknowledge decision-making. Offer a joint call slot. Summarize top 3 pros aligned to their priorities. Confirm next step: schedule a 10–15 min joint call or a site visit.

playbooks.title: Pricing objection handling
playbooks.content: Reframe to monthly outflow + value. Offer alternatives in same locality or adjacent micro-market. Ask if budget is fixed or flexible for the right project.

compliance.title: Consent & opt-out
compliance.content: Capture explicit consent to contact for future matching properties. If user says STOP/QUIT/CANCEL, immediately mark Do-Not-Call and end outreach.
